chains.title: source map → hidden API → IDOR/BOLA
chains.hard_rule: source map disclosure alone is not a vulnerability; server-side object authorization impact proof is required.

chains.title: frontend route guard → backend authz gap
chains.hard_rule: frontend guard evidence must be paired with backend handler and role evidence.

chains.title: import/export/download → path traversal → arbitrary file read/write candidate
chains.hard_rule: never read real secrets; use harmless local marker files only.

chains.title: webhook/image proxy/integration → SSRF candidate
chains.hard_rule: use local mock listener only; never target metadata or third-party infrastructure.

chains.title: role/membership/invite → privilege escalation / tenant isolation risk
chains.hard_rule: no real tenant data modification; use dry-run, test tenant, fixture database, or read-only proof.
